glosses.ja: 身震い; ゾクゾク感

sentences.target: J'ai un frisson à cause du courant d'air.
sentences.reading: /ʒe œ̃ fʁisɔ̃ a koz dy kuʁɑ̃ dɛʁ/

translations.fr: J'ai un frisson à cause du courant d'air.
translations.ipa: /ʒe œ̃ fʁisɔ̃ a koz dy kuʁɑ̃ dɛʁ/
translations.en: I've got a chill because of the draft.
translations.es: Tengo un escalofrío por la corriente de aire.
translations.de: Ich habe einen Schauer wegen der Zugluft.
translations.it: Ho un brivido a causa dello spiffero.
translations.zh-Hans: 我因为穿堂风打了个寒战。
translations.yue: 我因為穿堂風而打冷震。
translations.pt: Tenho um arrepio por causa da corrente de ar.
translations.he: יש לי צמרמורת בגלל רוח פרצים.
translations.vi: Tôi rùng mình vì gió lùa.
translations.nl: Ik krijg een rilling door de tocht.
translations.hu: A huzat miatt kiráz a hideg.
translations.hi: हवा के झोंके की वजह से मुझे सिहरन हो रही है.
translations.nb: Jeg får frysninger på grunn av trekk.
translations.sv: Jag får en rysning av draget.
translations.ro: Am un fior din cauza curentului.
translations.da: Jeg får et gys på grund af træk.
translations.ja: すきま風のせいでぞくっとした。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular present of avoir used as the main verb; includes attached subject clitic j' (elision of je before vowel).
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun frisson.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of J'ai.
Preposition starting the fixed prepositional locution à cause de (“because of”).
Noun within the fixed expression à cause de.
Contraction of the preposition de and the definite article le; introduces the complement noun phrase.
Common noun meaning current/flow; here ‘draft (of air)’, head of the complement NP after de.
Noun air with elided preposition de (d'); complements courant (courant d'air = air current/draft).

sentences.target: Ce film me donne un frisson.

translations.fr: Ce film me donne un frisson.
translations.en: This movie gives me a shiver.
translations.it: Questo film mi fa venire i brividi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这部电影让我起鸡皮疙瘩。
translations.yue: 呢套戲令我起雞皮疙瘩。
translations.ru: Этот фильм вызывает у меня мурашки.
translations.vi: Bộ phim này khiến tôi nổi da gà.
translations.uk: Цей фільм викликає в мене мурашки.
translations.hu: Ez a film kiráz a hideg.
translations.hi: यह फ़िल्म मुझे सिहरन देती है.
translations.pl: Ten film powoduje u mnie dreszcze.
translations.el: Αυτή η ταινία μου προκαλεί ανατριχίλα.
translations.sv: Den här filmen ger mig rysningar.
translations.cs: Ten film mi nahání husí kůži.
translations.fi: Tämä elokuva antaa minulle kylmiä väreitä.
translations.ja: この映画はゾクッとする。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying film.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
1st person singular clitic object pronoun (experiencer), placed before the verb.
3rd person singular present of donner; main predicate.
Indefinite article introducing frisson.
Common noun; direct object of donne.

sentences.target: On a un frisson d'un coup.

translations.fr: On a un frisson d'un coup.
translations.en: We get a chill all of a sudden.
translations.es: De repente nos da un escalofrío.
translations.pt: De repente nos dá um arrepio.
translations.vi: Đột nhiên chúng tôi rùng mình.
translations.hi: अचानक हमें सिहरन हो जाती है.
translations.ja: いきなりみんながぞくっとした。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun (‘one/we’).
3rd person singular present of avoir used as a main verb.
Indefinite article introducing frisson.
Common noun; direct object of a.
Elided preposition de with the article un; part of the idiom d'un coup (‘all of a sudden’), introducing coup.
Common noun; within the idiomatic prepositional phrase d'un coup meaning ‘suddenly’.

sentences.target: Tu aimes ce frisson avant de partir.
sentences.reading: /ty ɛm sə fʁisɔ̃ avɑ̃ də paʁtiʁ/

translations.fr: Tu aimes ce frisson avant de partir.
translations.ipa: /ty ɛm sə fʁisɔ̃ avɑ̃ də paʁtiʁ/
translations.en: You like that thrill before leaving.
translations.es: Te gusta ese cosquilleo antes de salir.
translations.de: Du magst dieses Kribbeln vor der Abfahrt.
translations.it: Ti piace quel brivido prima di partire.
translations.ko: 너는 떠나기 전 그 설렘을 좋아해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你喜欢出发前的那份兴奋。
translations.yue: 你鍾意臨出發前嗰陣嗰種刺激感。
translations.ru: Тебе нравится это волнение перед отъездом.
translations.pt: Você gosta daquela emoção antes de partir.
translations.he: אתה אוהב את הריגוש הזה לפני היציאה.
translations.vi: Bạn thích cảm giác hồi hộp trước khi lên đường.
translations.ar: أنت تحب ذلك الشعور المثير قبل المغادرة.
translations.nl: Je houdt van die spanning voor vertrek.
translations.uk: Тобі подобається це хвилювання перед від’їздом.
translations.hu: Szereted azt a bizsergést indulás előtt.
translations.hi: तुम्हें निकलने से पहले वाला रोमांच पसंद है.
translations.el: Σου αρέσει εκείνο το ρίγος πριν την αναχώρηση.
translations.nb: Du liker den kriblingen før avreise.
translations.id: Kamu suka rasa berdebar itu sebelum berangkat.
translations.sv: Du gillar det där pirret före avfärd.
translations.ro: Îți place fiorul acela înainte de plecare.
translations.cs: Líbí se ti to chvění před odjezdem.
translations.da: Du kan lide den der kriblen før afgang.
translations.fi: Pidät siitä kutkuttavasta tunteesta ennen lähtöä.
translations.ja: 出発前のあのワクワクが好きだ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
2nd person singular present of aimer; main predicate.
Demonstrative determiner modifying frisson.
Common noun; direct object of aimes.
Preposition in the sequence avant de introducing an infinitival clause.
Prepositional marker required after avant before an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement to avant de.
